title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 230.260 - Special named district in two or more counties, effect of
text:
230.260.  Special named district in two or more counties, effect of. — Sections 230.200 to 230.260 shall not apply to any special named district which is located in two or more counties unless all such counties shall adopt the alternative county highway commission plan as herein provided.
(L. 1971 H.B. 105 § 13)
